items.title: Cigna Expands Coverage for Home Phototherapy -- No Restrictions

items.title: ComEd Crews Working to Restore Power Following Thursday Storms
items.summary: CHICAGO, July 03, 2026--Following work to maintain the grid during three days of extreme heat, ComEd crews are restoring power to customers impacted by severe storms that moved through northern Illinois Thursday night. The storms had heavy rain, lightning and wind gusts in excess of 50 miles per hour. Since the storms began, more than 45,000 customers have been restored. 10,400 customers remain out of power.

items.title: ComEd, Metropolitan Mayors Caucus Honor Nine Communities Advancing EV Readiness Across Northern Illinois

items.title: ComEd Reaches 99% Restoration Following Multi-Day Severe Storm Event

With 99% of affected customers now restored, crews are in the final stages of repairs and remain committed to completing service restoration for all remaining customers.

items.title: KnowBe4 Hires Keith Bird as Executive Vice President of International Growth
